## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Tested in browser (which browser + tool)

## Checklist

- [ ] All processing stays client-side (no server uploads)
- [ ] No new external network calls from tool pages
- [ ] Bundle size hasn't increased significantly (check build output)
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard navigable, screen reader labels on icons
